app.name: XHS-Downloader
app.one_liner: A tool for extracting and downloading Xiaohongshu (RedNote) content via CLI, HTTP API (MCP), and browser userscript.

screens.name: Main Interface
screens.purpose: Orchestrate link input, metadata fetching, and file downloading across CLI, server, or userscript modes.
primary_actions: Configure download preferences (e.g., image selection, video quality)
Dispatch download tasks to local or remote instance

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist downloaded Xiaohongshu content and associated metadata to local storage with configurable organization.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core link parsing and metadata fetching from Xiaohongshu
week 1: Integrate basic throttling and proxy support
week 1: Set up SQLite storage for download records and work metadata
acceptance_tests: Metadata for downloaded works is correctly stored in ExploreData.db with author and post time.
System successfully downloads a Xiaohongshu video with user-specified quality preference via MCP API.
